title: Ç̌
summary: C with cedilla and caron (Ç̌ ç̌) is an additional letter used in transliteration of the Laz, Georgian, Avar and Udi languages in certain KNAB romanisations. It is composed of a C with a caron and a cedilla.
text:
C with cedilla and caron (Ç̌ ç̌) is an additional letter used in transliteration of the Laz, Georgian, Avar and Udi languages in certain KNAB romanisations. It is composed of a C with a caron and a cedilla.
